intro: Cryptantha cycloptera, also known as cycloptera cryptantha, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, pain, and respiratory problems, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of Cryptantha cycloptera include iridoid glycosides, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. In herbal medicine, Cryptantha cycloptera is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic properties.
